name: Doggo
short_description: Casually walk and jump over spikes and snails in this dog-based action platformer!
detailed_description:
Casually walk and jump over spikes and snails in this dog-based action platformer!

Get ready to search high and low for your dog house, collecting lost dogs, hats and bones along the way. Bury your bone to create a special healing spot for future runs. Watch out for the spikes and purple snails or you will need to take a bite out of your limited dog treats!

Race against your own best time as you see the Ghost of your past, or load the Ghost of on online dog into your game to learn the secret optimizations. Your cosmetics will show up in others games so make sure to equip your most flashy hats or maybe you want to bounce around in a toilet! With plenty of custom skins you are bound to find your style!

Game Features


Steam Leaderboards!
Cloud Saves
Unlock new dogs and hats to customize your character!
Use ghosts to sharpen your skills and top the leaderboards!
Lots of rewards!
Barking!
Digging!
